hero.subtitle: Since 1997, Al Binaa has delivered over 20 structures across Oman's residential, commercial, and hospitality sectors — every project executed under a single management structure, with no discipline outsourced and no accountability shared.

services.label: What Do We Build?
services.heading:
Three Disciplines.
One Contract.
services.body: Most projects fail at the interfaces between contractors. Ours don't — because there are no interfaces. Structure, MEP, and Interior Finishing: three disciplines under one management, one quality standard, one contract.

cta.heading:
Most projects fail at the interfaces
between contractors.
cta.sub: Ours don't — because there are none. Tell us about your project.

footer.tagline: One company. Three disciplines. Twenty-eight years of uninterrupted delivery across Oman's residential, commercial, and hospitality sectors.
footer.rights: © 2026 Al Binaa Construction & Industry SAOC. All rights reserved.

about.banner_sub: Est. 1997, Muscat — twenty-eight years of uninterrupted delivery.
about.story_heading:
Built in Oman.
Built for Oman.
about.story_p1: Founded in 1997 under the Al Khonji Group, Al Binaa Construction & Industry SAOC has grown from a civil contractor into one of Oman's most trusted full-service builders — 20+ structures delivered across residential, commercial, and hospitality, with every discipline retained in-house. From private villas to 10-storey towers, we transform briefs into landmarks.
about.story_p2: Our engineers, supervisors, and skilled tradespeople are employed directly — not agency-sourced — and deliver every project on time, within budget, and to the highest standards of safety and quality. Every building carries our name. That standard has not changed in twenty-eight years of uninterrupted operation.
about.story_est: Est. under the Al Khonji Group
about.mission_body:
To deliver every phase of a construction project — structure, systems, and finishing — under a single management structure, so no discipline is outsourced and no accountability is shared.

One contract. One team. One standard — applied to every project we undertake, regardless of scale.
about.vision_body:
To be the contractor Oman's most serious developers and institutional clients return to — not because of marketing, but because of twenty-eight years of uninterrupted delivery.

The benchmark integrated contractor in Oman: known for reliability, technical depth, and a standard of execution that has never been compromised.
about.leadership_sub: Senior leadership with deep roots in Oman's construction sector — setting the standard for every project we deliver.
about.csr_body: Not a policy document — embedded in how every site is run, every worker treated, every contract managed.
about.team_sub: Civil engineers, MEP engineers, supervisors, and skilled tradespeople — employed directly, not agency-sourced.

contact.banner_sub: We respond within one business day. Serious enquiries only.
contact.form_success: Thank you — we'll be in touch within one business day.
